title: Create Combined
body:
[![Create Combined Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a98058b85429a9f2e8ae74cdf0ae6ca7d1c3de4.png)](https://discord.gg/Asv7EJSJf5) ## New Structures and Biomes | WWOO | Yung's Mods | Geophilic | Luki's Grand Capitals | Continental | And more! | |------|-------------|-----------|-----------------------|-------------|-----------| ![A randomly picked landscape split over time](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/541b1c90b9f5be1be4c1c4b976386d334700ce43.png) ## Mechanical Mayhem Create is at the core, with Create: Aeronautics, Create: Slice & Dice, and plenty of smaller add-ons for factories, contraptions, automation, and airborne builds. ## Unique Mobs Naturalist adds more life to the world with new animals and encounters. ## Performant Built on all the top performance mods–sodium, lithium, modernfix–it runs smooth! ## Cinematic Iris and Immersive Thunder help make the world look and feel more atmospheric. ## Community Videos If you plan to make videos with the pack, please let me know! I'd love to feature your videos here too.
📺 Videos
